summary: GitMap installer, global -Defaults/-Y flags, and run.ps1 enhancements
changes: Added script 35 (35-install-gitmap) -- installs GitMap CLI via remote installer from GitHub (alimtvnetwork/git-repo-navigator)
Added gitmap, git-map install keywords mapping to script ID 35
Added GitMap to all-dev config (script 12) and registry.json
Added global -Defaults (-D) and -Y flags to run.ps1 -- propagated to child scripts
-Defaults shows default values and prompts for confirmation; -Defaults -Y auto-confirms
Added Defaults Mode section to run.ps1 help showing default directory, VS Code edition, and sync mode
Added spec/35-install-gitmap/readme.md with full usage documentation
